New Detailer Job
📋 Customer Info
💰 Job Details
💼 Brnno Cut (25%): $0.00 🔧 Detailer Cut (75%): $0.00
🔧 Detailer Assignment
Full Detail Checklist — Mike Johnson
📋 Job Summary
Customer: Mike Johnson
Vehicle: 2022 Ford F-150
Address: 1234 Oak Street, Salt Lake City, UT 84101
Date/Time: Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 9:00 AM
Service: Full Detail
Detailer Pay: $187.50
Notes: Gate code is #4521. Park in driveway.
🚗 EXTERIOR — Pre-Wash
Rinse entire vehicle to remove loose dirt
Apply pre-wash foam/snow foam
Rinse pre-wash off
🚗 EXTERIOR — Hand Wash
Two-bucket wash method (wash + rinse bucket)
Wash roof first, work top to bottom
Clean door jambs and edges
Wash wheels and wheel wells separately
Clean tires with dedicated brush
Rinse entire vehicle thoroughly
🚗 EXTERIOR — Paint Decontamination
Clay bar or clay mitt on all painted surfaces
Iron remover if needed
Rinse off any decontamination products
🚗 EXTERIOR — Polish & Protection
Dry vehicle completely (microfiber or air blower)
Apply wax or paint sealant to all painted surfaces
Wipe off wax/sealant residue
Apply tire dressing to tires
Clean and dress exterior trim
Clean and shine all glass (exterior)
🚗 EXTERIOR — Final Check
Inspect for missed spots or streaks
Wipe door handles and emblems
Final walkround inspection
🏠 INTERIOR — Remove & Prep
Remove all trash and personal items (place aside for customer)
Remove floor mats
Vacuum floor mats separately
🏠 INTERIOR — Vacuum
Vacuum all seats (front and rear)
Vacuum floor carpets and under seats
Vacuum trunk/cargo area
Vacuum headliner if needed
Clean vents with brush then vacuum
🏠 INTERIOR — Deep Clean
Shampoo/extract carpet if needed
Shampoo/extract fabric seats if applicable
Clean and condition leather seats (if leather)
Scrub floor mats and rinse
Clean all door panels and pockets
Clean center console inside and out
Clean dashboard — top, sides, vents
Clean steering wheel and column
Clean all cup holders
Clean sun visors
🏠 INTERIOR — Glass & Trim
Clean all interior glass (windows, mirrors, sunroof)
Apply UV protectant/dressing to all plastic trim
Condition rubber seals
Clean and polish interior chrome/metal accents
🏠 INTERIOR — Final Check
Replace floor mats
Wipe down all surfaces for fingerprints
Final vacuum pass if needed
Check for any missed areas
Hang air freshener
Loading...
